FGO_POTION_POTION_I_D.title: Some Kind of Potion
FGO_POTION_POTION_I_D.description: Little pieces that get put together into a description. Exactly how depends on the potion, and you can set it up however you want.
FGO_POTION_ELIXIROF_REJUVENATION.title: Elixir of Rejuvenation
FGO_POTION_ELIXIROF_REJUVENATION.descrip: Heal 10 HP. Remove all of your debuffs.
